title: cirsium miliarakisii
intro: Cirsium miliarakisii, also known as the Cretan thistle, is a species of thistle native to Greece. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Cirsium miliarakisii can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
